subtopics.title: What is Agriculture?
subtopics.teaching_note: Agriculture: science and practice of cultivating soil, growing crops, and raising animals for human use. Branches: Crop science (arable farming), Animal science (livestock), Soil science, Fishery, Forestry, Agricultural economics. Importance: provides food, employment (70% of Nigerians), raw materials (cotton, rubber), foreign exchange (cocoa, palm oil). Nigeria was once known for: groundnut pyramids (Kano), cocoa (Western region), palm oil (Eastern region), cotton (Northern region).
